pricing.note: Planner route can be non-Sonnet; cost is normalised using Sonnet 4.6 constants.
pricing.payload_token_estimate_method: Estimated as payload character count / 4; non-billable approximation.

tasks.request: Navigate to the BBC News Technology section.
Open English Wikipedia, then navigate to Current events.
Navigate to the Explore page, then open Trending repositories.
Navigate to r/AskReddit.
Navigate to the Trending page.
Search for 'python web scraping tutorial' and wait for results.
Search Wikipedia for 'Alan Turing' and open the article.
Search GitHub for 'playwright python' and view results.
Search Amazon for 'wireless headphones'.
Search Stack Overflow for 'python async await'.
Navigate to BBC Sport, then to the Football section.
Navigate to Today's Deals page.
Click 'Random article' to go to a random Wikipedia article.
Navigate to the Issues tab of this repository.
Navigate to the 'new' submissions page.
Navigate to the Top 250 Movies chart.
Search MDN for 'CSS Grid' and open the CSS Grid Layout guide.
Navigate to the asyncio library documentation.
Search for 'northern lights' then switch to the Images tab.
Sort questions by votes (highest score).
Dismiss any cookie banner, then navigate to BBC News.
Dismiss any cookie/consent prompts and navigate to the Popular feed.
Click the 'More information...' link.
Open the first story link on the page.
Click the link to today's featured article.
